paragraphs.text: Side-by-side specification of every tier's compute envelope: physical cores, base & burst clock speeds, RAM topology, L3 cache, hypervisor stack, and live hourly cost. All measurements are benchmarked on us-east-1 in March 2024.
Burst clock sustainable for ≤ 120s before throttling on Nano/Micro; unlimited on Pro & Enterprise dedicated cores.
DDR5 tiers achieve ~38% higher memory bandwidth on STREAM Triad benchmarks vs DDR4 generation hardware.
Xen-backed tiers expose CPU pinning and NUMA topology via metadata API; KVM tiers use noisy-neighbor mitigation only.
All compute costs metered to the second with a 60-second minimum charge; sustained-use discount kicks in at 720h/mo.
T4 attaches to any tier ≥ Standard. A10G/A100 require Pro or Enterprise host with dedicated NUMA node.
Pre-baked images ship with CUDA 12.2 + cuDNN 8.9; bring-your-own drivers permitted on Enterprise only.
Spot pricing for T4 and A10G discounted up to 64% off list; A100 spot pool capacity-constrained, check region.
Vendor-neutral, transparent comparison of cloud hosting tiers. All numbers reproducible from public pricing pages and standardized benchmarks.

items.text:
Nucleon Cloud Benchmark
        
          Vendor-neutral, transparent comparison of cloud hosting tiers. All numbers reproducible from public pricing pages and standardized benchmarks.

Compare
        
          overview
          compute-plans
          storage-addons
          network-features
          cost-calculator

Tiers
        
          Nano
          Micro
          Standard
          Pro
          Enterprise

Resources
        
          Methodology
          Raw data CSV
          Changelog
          Contact

Burst window
      Burst clock sustainable for ≤ 120s before throttling on Nano/Micro; unlimited on Pro & Enterprise dedicated cores.

DDR4 vs DDR5
      DDR5 tiers achieve ~38% higher memory bandwidth on STREAM Triad benchmarks vs DDR4 generation hardware.

Hypervisor isolation
      Xen-backed tiers expose CPU pinning and NUMA topology via metadata API; KVM tiers use noisy-neighbor mitigation only.

Billing granularity
      All compute costs metered to the second with a 60-second minimum charge; sustained-use discount kicks in at 720h/mo.

Attachment policy
      T4 attaches to any tier ≥ Standard. A10G/A100 require Pro or Enterprise host with dedicated NUMA node.

Driver stack
      Pre-baked images ship with CUDA 12.2 + cuDNN 8.9; bring-your-own drivers permitted on Enterprise only.

Spot availability
      Spot pricing for T4 and A10G discounted up to 64% off list; A100 spot pool capacity-constrained, check region.
